inventory_companions.settings.title: Settings
inventory_companions.settings.enabled.de: Fully enables or disables drawing the animation over the inventory.
inventory_companions.settings.survival_o: Adjusts the companion position in the normal survival inventory. The offset is counted from the top-left corner of the inventory window.
inventory_companions.settings.creative_o: Adjusts the companion position in the creative inventory tab. The offset is counted from the top-left corner of the creative inventory window.
inventory_companions.settings.offset_x.s: Default: 125. Moves the companion left and right.
inventory_companions.settings.offset_y.s: Default: 53. Moves the companion up and down.
inventory_companions.settings.offset_x.c: Default: 126. Moves the companion left and right.
inventory_companions.settings.offset_y.c: Default: 14. Moves the companion up and down.
